name: DreamWall
message: Born from a partnership between Dupuis and RTBF, DreamWall, an an imation and graphics studio located in Charleroi (Belgium), is ac tive in different markets: Media Solutions: Mastered, complete an d unique expertise in studios and virtual creations. Files with p ersonal data, medical files, contracts, agreements with other com panies, financial data. Everything is about 15GB. We will make th e files available soon.
